title: Mood Check-in
description: Log your mood, energy, and stress in a few taps.

openGraph.title: Mood Check-in
openGraph.description: Log your mood, energy, and stress in a few taps.

prompts: What made you feel grateful today?
What sensation in your body or mind is most noticeable right now?
What small promise do you want to keep today?
Leave a short note for your future self.
summary: Mood is {{mood}}, energy is {{energy}}, and stress is {{stress}}.

lowMood: Take a short walk and reset your breathing.
Play one song that feels comforting.
goodMood: Stay hydrated to keep the momentum.
Capture today's good moment in writing.
lowEnergy: Do a quick stretch to wake up your body.
Sip a warm drink to reset your rhythm.
highStress: Slow down with five minutes of deep breathing.
List only three must-do tasks for today.
neutral: Pick the one most important task for today.
Relax your shoulders and close your eyes for a moment.
